project.name: OAuth-Sheriff Core (relocated to Token-Sheriff)
project.description: Renamed to de.cuioss.sheriff.token:token-sheriff-validation. This is a relocation stub; resolvers redirect automatically and print a relocation warning. Note: Java packages (de.cuioss.sheriff.oauth.core → de.cuioss.sheriff.token.validation) and config keys (sheriff.oauth → sheriff.token) still require the source changes in the migration guide.

relocation.message: OAuth-Sheriff has been renamed to Token-Sheriff. Update coordinates to de.cuioss.sheriff.token:token-sheriff-validation. Imports and config keys also change — see https://github.com/cuioss/TokenSheriff/blob/main/doc/oidc/01-restructure/migration-nifi-extensions.adoc
